title: The Crew Splits Up
description: On pages 9–12, the crew splits up as the Straw Hats enter Little Garden, an island frozen in prehistoric time, and split up amid dinosaurs and jungle danger.
scene: The Crew Splits Up. The Straw Hats enter Little Garden, an island frozen in prehistoric time, and split up amid dinosaurs and jungle danger. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't have the time to listen to either of you two blabbering on and on...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ah, that made for some good exercise.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Finally managed to digest all that food I ate...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: It can't be! An officer agent of bar- oque works was...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Luffy, just calm down and listen to me.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The people of this village were actually all bounty hunters.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: What kind of enemies would feed us!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: My ability allows me to freely change my weight,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: from 1kg to 10,000kg in the blink of an eye!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Seems like you just won't listen to anything I have to say...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But if you're going to get serious, so will I! Just don't complain after I kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Wait a second... what's going on!?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the crew splits up. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
